body.docCnt: ##接口调用地址 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/custom-file/batch-delete 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/custom-file/batch-delete ## 接口描述 自定义档案根据自定义档案编码批量删除接口 接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 自定义档案 接口调用注意事项： * 接口调用单次最大支持50条； * 接口不支持部分成功，单次接口调用全量成功/失败； ## 调用方式 METHOD: POST CONTENT-TYPE: application/json ## 接口输入参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%9C%A8%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%0A%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%20-%3E%20%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%20-%3E%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%20-%3E%20%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%2F%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%EF%BC%88%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%89","maxLength":"20"}}]}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}] ## 接口输出参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}] ## 接口调用示例 #### 请求报文 ```json [ "CUSTOM0001", "CUSTOM0002" ] ``` #### 响应报文 ```json { "returnCode": "SUC0000", "success": true, "message": "成功" } ``` ```json { "returnCode": "EROOR1", "success": false, "message": "不存在的档案编码【CUS1000】请核对后重试" } ``` ## 错误码说明 | 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案| | --- | --- | --- | | SUC0000| 成功| 成功| | EROOR1| 系统异常| 系统错误，联系管理员处理| | EROOR2| 业务执行错误| 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/custom-file/batch-delete

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/custom-file/batch-delete

接口描述

自定义档案根据自定义档案编码批量删除接口

接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 自定义档案

接口调用注意事项：

  • 接口调用单次最大支持50条；
  • 接口不支持部分成功，单次接口调用全量成功/失败；

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%9C%A8%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%0A%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%20-%3E%20%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%20-%3E%20%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%20-%3E%20%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%2F%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%EF%BC%88%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%89","maxLength":"20"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

[
    "CUSTOM0001",
    "CUSTOM0002"
]

响应报文

{  
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",  
    "success": true,  
    "message": "成功"  
}  

{  
    "returnCode": "EROOR1",  
    "success": false,  
    "message": "不存在的档案编码【CUS1000】请核对后重试"  
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
SUC0000 成功 成功
EROOR1 系统异常 系统错误，联系管理员处理
EROOR2 业务执行错误 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试
body.menuLevelName: 开发文档/智能费控/档案信息/自定义档案
